## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `inode ...`
2. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error output.

## Environment

- inode version: (`inode --version`)
- OS: (macOS 15 / Ubuntu 24.04 / Windows 11)
- Go version: (`go version`)

## Additional Context

Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
